name: White Chip Fruit Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl, beat butter and powdered sugar until smooth. Blend in flour.
3. Press mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of a 12-inch round pizza pan.
4. Using a fluted edge, if necessary.
5. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned; cool completely.
6. Prepare white filling: In a microwave-safe bowl, place Premier White Chips (Hershey's) and whipping cream. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until chips are melted and mixture is smooth when stirred vigorously. Beat in cream cheese.
7. Spread filling on cooled crust; cover and refrigerate.
8. Prepare fruit topping: In a small saucepan, stir together sugar and cornstarch; stir in juices. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. Cool.
9. Arrange fruit on top of filling; carefully pour or brush juice mixture over fruit.
10. Serve chilled.
